mapper.sql: id_rep_isr, rfc, anio, nombre, curp, ing_anual_sueldo, ing_exc_sueldo, ing_acum_sueldo, subsidio_sueldo, imp_ret_sueldo, ing_anual_honor, ing_exc_honor, ing_acum_honor, subsidio_honor, imp_ret_honor, ing_anual_separa, ing_exc_separa, ing_acum_separa, subsidio_separa, imp_ret_separa
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from tps021_reporte_isr
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into tps021_reporte_isr (id_rep_isr, rfc, anio, nombre, curp, ing_anual_sueldo, ing_exc_sueldo, ing_acum_sueldo, subsidio_sueldo, imp_ret_sueldo, ing_anual_honor, ing_exc_honor, ing_acum_honor, subsidio_honor, imp_ret_honor, ing_anual_separa, ing_exc_separa, ing_acum_separa, subsidio_separa, imp_ret_separa) values (#{idRepIsr,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{rfc,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{anio,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, #{nombre,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{curp,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{ingAnualSueldo,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{ingExcSueldo,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{ingAcumSueldo,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{subsidioSueldo,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{impRetSueldo,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{ingAnualHonor,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{ingExcHonor,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{ingAcumHonor,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{subsidioHonor,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{impRetHonor,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{ingAnualSepara,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{ingExcSepara,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{ingAcumSepara,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{subsidioSepara,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{impRetSepara,jdbcType=DECIMAL})

mapper.update:
update tps021_reporte_isr
id_rep_isr = #{record.idRepIsr,jdbcType=INTEGER},
rfc = #{record.rfc,jdbcType=CHAR},
anio = #{record.anio,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
nombre = #{record.nombre,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
curp = #{record.curp,jdbcType=CHAR},
ing_anual_sueldo = #{record.ingAnualSueldo,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
ing_exc_sueldo = #{record.ingExcSueldo,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
ing_acum_sueldo = #{record.ingAcumSueldo,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
subsidio_sueldo = #{record.subsidioSueldo,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
imp_ret_sueldo = #{record.impRetSueldo,jdbcType=DECIMAL},

subsidio_separa = #{record.subsidioSepara,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
imp_ret_separa = #{record.impRetSepara,jdbcType=DECIMAL},

update tps021_reporte_isr set id_rep_isr = #{record.idRepIsr,jdbcType=INTEGER}, rfc = #{record.rfc,jdbcType=CHAR}, anio = #{record.anio,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, nombre = #{record.nombre,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, curp = #{record.curp,jdbcType=CHAR}, ing_anual_sueldo = #{record.ingAnualSueldo,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, ing_exc_sueldo = #{record.ingExcSueldo,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, ing_acum_sueldo = #{record.ingAcumSueldo,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, subsidio_sueldo = #{record.subsidioSueldo,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, imp_ret_sueldo = #{record.impRetSueldo,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, ing_anual_honor = #{record.ingAnualHonor,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, ing_exc_honor = #{record.ingExcHonor,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, ing_acum_honor = #{record.ingAcumHonor,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, subsidio_honor = #{record.subsidioHonor,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, imp_ret_honor = #{record.impRetHonor,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, ing_anual_separa = #{record.ingAnualSepara,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, ing_exc_separa = #{record.ingExcSepara,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, ing_acum_separa = #{record.ingAcumSepara,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, subsidio_separa = #{record.subsidioSepara,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, imp_ret_separa = #{record.impRetSepara,jdbcType=DECIMAL}

update tps021_reporte_isr
rfc = #{rfc,jdbcType=CHAR},
anio = #{anio,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
nombre = #{nombre,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
curp = #{curp,jdbcType=CHAR},
ing_anual_sueldo = #{ingAnualSueldo,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
ing_exc_sueldo = #{ingExcSueldo,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
ing_acum_sueldo = #{ingAcumSueldo,jdbcType=DECIMAL},

imp_ret_honor = #{impRetHonor,jdbcType=DECIMAL},

subsidio_separa = #{subsidioSepara,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
imp_ret_separa = #{impRetSepara,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
where id_rep_isr = #{idRepIsr,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update tps021_reporte_isr set rfc = #{rfc,jdbcType=CHAR}, anio = #{anio,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, nombre = #{nombre,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, curp = #{curp,jdbcType=CHAR}, ing_anual_sueldo = #{ingAnualSueldo,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, ing_exc_sueldo = #{ingExcSueldo,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, ing_acum_sueldo = #{ingAcumSueldo,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, subsidio_sueldo = #{subsidioSueldo,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, imp_ret_sueldo = #{impRetSueldo,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, ing_anual_honor = #{ingAnualHonor,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, ing_exc_honor = #{ingExcHonor,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, ing_acum_honor = #{ingAcumHonor,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, subsidio_honor = #{subsidioHonor,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, imp_ret_honor = #{impRetHonor,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, ing_anual_separa = #{ingAnualSepara,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, ing_exc_separa = #{ingExcSepara,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, ing_acum_separa = #{ingAcumSepara,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, subsidio_separa = #{subsidioSepara,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, imp_ret_separa = #{impRetSepara,jdbcType=DECIMAL} where id_rep_isr = #{idRepIsr,jdbcType=INTEGER}
